underlying_goal: Fix a datetime naive/aware mismatch bug in a Flask scheduler, iterate through code review feedback, and diagnose why the bug persists in production
friction_detail: Claude initially concluded the fix was already correct and needed user correction to realize the bug was still present in production, eventually identifying stale __pycache__ as the likely culprit.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix a datetime crash in a scheduler, iterated through code reviews, then debugged why production still failed; Claude eventually identified missing .dockerignore causing stale bytecode but session ended before full resolution.
